introSection:
Minifigure Speedway is a steel twin shuttle roller coaster currently located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. The name and theme were revealed on 15 November 2023. In March 2024, Legoland announced that the coaster would open on 6 April.

The roller coaster was manufactured by Zierer. Within the footprint of the ride is Roxie, a tall Lego minifigure said to be the largest in the world. She is the official mascot of Minifigure Speedway.
fullText:
Minifigure Speedway is a steel twin shuttle roller coaster currently located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. The name and theme were revealed on 15 November 2023. In March 2024, Legoland announced that the coaster would open on 6 April.

The roller coaster was manufactured by Zierer. Within the footprint of the ride is Roxie, a tall Lego minifigure said to be the largest in the world. She is the official mascot of Minifigure Speedway.
